segment.source: Renders a two-column hero: headline, lead subheadline, and primary button on the left, a featured customer-quote card with avatar, name, and role on the right. Use it for: page openers that combine a value proposition with a customer quote, endorsement-led landing page intros, review snippets placed in a cover section. Prefer 'Hero Section' for a plain opener without a quote; use 'Featured Testimonial' for a standalone quote mid-page.
